title: Perform carcase Meat Hygiene Assessment
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform carcase Meat Hygiene Assessment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Receive work instructions and clarify where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Receive work instructions and clarify where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Receive work instructions and clarify where required.

pcs.text: Identify health, safety and food safety hazards for task, and control associated risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health, safety and food safety hazards for task, and control associated risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health, safety and food safety hazards for task, and control associated risks.

pcs.text: Wear appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) and clothing, and ensure correct fit

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Wear appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) and clothing, and ensure correct fit.

pcs.text: Ensure knife is sharp and ready for use

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure knife is sharp and ready for use.

pcs.text: Identify approved sampling plan for sample size and frequency

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify approved sampling plan for sample size and frequency.

elements.title: Monitor carcase product

pcs.text: Select samples for assessment according to the approved sampling plan

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct assessment utilising appropriate facilities, lighting and time.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor carcases for defects according to the agreed criteria and classification.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record defects accurately using the correct forms or electronic system.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate defect ratings.

pcs.text: Implement immediate corrective action according to the Meat Hygiene Assessment (MHA) program's requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement immediate corrective action according to the Meat Hygiene Assessment (MHA) program's requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement immediate corrective action according to the Meat Hygiene Assessment (MHA) program's requirements.

pcs.text: Monitor carcases according to the workplace requirements for hygiene and sanitation, and regulatory requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor carcases according to the workplace requirements for hygiene and sanitation, and regulatory requirements.
